title: Looking for Teacher at IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners!
